name: Triage Agent
description: Classifies incidents by severity and category, identifies suspected cause, and recommends next steps.

skills.name: triage_incident
skills.description: Analyse a service alert using metrics, logs, and deployment data. Produces a structured triage result with priority, category, suspected cause, and recommended next step.
examples: Triage this alert: payments-service 34% error rate, deploy #4821
Classify and prioritise: payments-service is returning 500 errors since 02:51 UTC
